/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/server/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/CommonTypesC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/CommonTypesS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/ExceptionsC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/ExceptionsS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/MathServiceC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/MathServiceS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/StoreServiceC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/StoreServiceS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/AnyServiceC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/AnyServiceS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/BigPayloadC.cpp.o CMakeFiles/complex_corba_server.dir/gen/BigPayloadS.cpp.o -o complex_corba_server  -Wl,-rpath,/root/project_x/corba_Viewer/ACE_wrappers/lib /root/project_x/corba_Viewer/ACE_wrappers/lib/libTAO_PortableServer.so /root/project_x/corba_Viewer/ACE_wrappers/lib/libTAO_AnyTypeCode.so /root/project_x/corba_Viewer/ACE_wrappers/lib/libTAO_IORTable.so /root/project_x/corba_Viewer/ACE_wrappers/lib/libTAO_CosNaming.so /root/project_x/corba_Viewer/ACE_wrappers/lib/libTAO.so /root/project_x/corba_Viewer/ACE_wrappers/lib/libACE.so
